areaLabel: Bridgehead East Bank and River Watch Slice
notes: Ninth real slice keeps chapter throughput high by reusing the standardized clerk -> sentry -> gate -> shop -> chest -> encounter pattern from chapter-08. The main new pressure is not runtime complexity but keeping chapter-local maps, reference pack scaffolding, and cross-chapter portal stitching consistent as the route grows eastward. / 第九段真实切片继续复用 chapter-08 已标准化的文吏 -> 守兵 -> 栅门 -> 商店 -> 宝箱 -> 遭遇战模式，以维持章节吞吐。新增压力不在运行时复杂度，而在于随着路线继续向东扩展，如何保持章节局部地图、reference pack 骨架和跨章 portal 拼接的一致性。
title: River Watch Post Advance
